code:
fn safe_divide(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Option<Int>
  if b == 0
    None
  else
    Some(a / b)
  end
end

fn describe(_ r: Option<Int>) -> String
  match r
  when Some(v)
    "OK=#{v}"
  when None
    "NONE"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  println(describe(safe_divide(10, 2)))
  println(describe(safe_divide(10, 0)))
end
